about.title: About me
about.description:
I'm a Junior developer focused on Frontend development, graduated in Systems Analysis and Development from FIAP, where I also pursue a postgraduate degree in Java Architecture and Development. Since June/2024, I have been working at MRM McCann Worldgroup, contributing to agile teams on digital innovation projects.

 My daily work is focused on Frontend with React and Next.js, but I also have Full Stack experience gained in academic and personal projects, especially in the backend with Java, Spring Boot and SQL.
about.experienceRole: Full Stack Developer - MRM McCann WorldGroup
about.experienceClient: Clients: GM - Mastercard - Leroy Merlin - Diageo
about.academicCourse: Formed of Systems Analysis and Development - FIAP
about.academicCourse2: Student of Architecture and Java development - FIAP

technologies.title: Technologies
technologies.description: Check out my stack of skills and experience in technology:
technologies.typescript: JavaScript with static typing, used for safer large-scale projects.
technologies.javascript: Core web language, used in both front-end and back-end.
technologies.react: Library for building modern and reusable user interfaces.
technologies.next: React framework with SSR, focused on performance and SEO.
technologies.tailwind: Utility-first CSS framework for fast and responsive styling.
technologies.node: JavaScript on the backend for APIs, automation, and servers.
technologies.java: OOP language used in robust systems and Android development.
technologies.python: Versatile, great for automation, back-end, and data science.
technologies.aws: Amazon cloud services for APIs, storage, and scalability.
technologies.azure: Microsoft's cloud platform, well-integrated for enterprise apps.
technologies.c#: Microsoft's cloud platform, well-integrated for enterprise apps.
technologies.aem: Adobe Experience Manager for managing digital content and experiences.
technologies.strapi: Headless CMS used to build and manage APIs efficiently.

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: Here you can find some of the most relevant projects I’ve developed throughout my journey as a developer.
projects.titleProject2: LP Development – God of War Ragnarok
projects.descriptionProject1: The application allows users to enter their average electricity consumption and location to receive a personalized estimate of savings with solar energy.
projects.descriptionProject2: Themed landing page inspired by the universe of God of War: Ragnarok, focused on impactful visuals and performance.
projects.descriptionProject3: I developed a project that involved creating an intelligent device for real-time monitoring of three essential parameters: Temperature, Water pH, and Water Level.
projects.descriptionProject4: E-commerce simulator with a responsive layout where users can view products, add them to the cart, and simulate a purchase.
projects.descriptionProject5: The system allows account creation, balance inquiry, deposits, withdrawals, and PIX transfers. I used enums for account types (CHECKING, SAVINGS, SALARY) and account status (ACTIVE, INACTIVE).
